input_text: The length of the red car is 3 meters. The cake was eaten. The letter written by Mary arrived. The picture was painted by Leo. The room was cleaned by the maid. The teacher showed a map to the students. The tree was cut by the farmer. Jessica is a mouse. Dole was defeated by Clinton. The children playing in the garden laughed. Any person is male or female. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Big or strong elephants are nice. Earth contains Europe. Americans can not disappear. If John is glad, then Mike is not glad. Tom wanted to leave. The city was destroyed. Penguins do not fly. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 10 percent. Eve failed to finish the report. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. Daniel journeyed to the hallway. A tall and quiet man entered. Anna handed Mark a key. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Winona is a sheep. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Sue is a true patriot. The rain continued. A village road was narrow. "Riga is outside America. Unexpectedly, the door opened. Who was the meal for?
